# Oncoteam

> Your always-ready AI team for cancer treatment management. Your data lives in Google Drive, Gmail, and Calendar — Oncofiles organizes it, Oncoteam makes it work for you. 18 autonomous agents find treatments, check protocols, explain everything in patient and doctor language, prepare you for appointments, inform your family, and search compatible clinical trials. Stay in control, even as a medicine amateur.

## What Oncoteam Does

- Analyzes lab results with trend tracking, inflammation indices (SII, Ne/Ly ratio), and pre-cycle safety checks
- Matches clinical trials from ClinicalTrials.gov and PubMed across 14 European countries based on molecular profile (KRAS, NRAS, BRAF, HER2, MSI/MMR status)
- Tracks treatment protocols with dose modification rules, cumulative dose thresholds, and cycle delay criteria
- Sends proactive WhatsApp safety alerts and weekly briefings to you and your family
- Processes medical documents (lab reports, pathology, imaging, genetics) with OCR and structured data extraction
- Provides bilingual interface (Slovak/English) with medical dictionary and plain-language explanations
- Generates family-friendly treatment summaries
- Applies medical standards (DeVita textbook, NCCN protocols) as automatic second opinion
- Prepares you for doctor appointments with the right questions and situation understanding

## Multi-Channel Access

- **Dashboard**: Full data view, dose tracking, dictionary, trends, agent observatory
- **Claude.ai / ChatGPT**: Deep analysis, Q&A, research via MCP protocol
- **WhatsApp**: Quick alerts, briefings, ask-on-the-go for patient and family
- **Autonomous agents**: 18 background agents monitoring, researching, and notifying 24/7

## Architecture

- Built on the Model Context Protocol (MCP) — open, interoperable standard for AI tool use
- 18 specialized autonomous agents running clinical and research tasks
- 24 MCP tools for PubMed search, clinical trial matching, lab analysis, and document processing
- Two-layer architecture: Oncofiles (data/persistence layer) + Oncoteam (intelligence layer)
- Patient data stored in patient-owned Google Drive (GDPR compliant)
- Dashboard built with Nuxt 4, backend with Python/FastMCP

## Who It's For

- Cancer patients managing their own treatment data
- Family caregivers coordinating care
- Patient advocates navigating the healthcare system
- Healthcare professionals seeking AI-assisted treatment management
